semantic.role: API request handler and entry point
responsibilities: Coordinates user creation requests by interacting with domain services
Defines the CreateUserHandler class to manage incoming request payloads
Currently contains a direct dependency on infra/database, noted as an architecture violation in comments
Serves as the primary boundary between external callers and internal system logic

English.purpose: This document defines the API request handler and entry point for the ArchSpine mirror system. It describes how incoming user creation requests are coordinated through domain services and establishes the boundary between external callers and internal logic.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and system architects who need to understand the API layer's role in request handling, including its current architectural dependencies and the noted violation regarding direct infrastructure coupling.
key_takeaways: The handler coordinates user creation via domain services
A direct dependency on infra/database exists and is flagged as an architecture violation
This file acts as the primary boundary between external callers and internal system logic

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 镜像系统的 API 请求处理程序与入口点，描述了如何通过领域服务协调传入的用户创建请求，并建立了外部调用者与内部逻辑之间的边界。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向需要理解 API 层在请求处理中角色的开发者和系统架构师，包括其当前的架构依赖关系以及关于直接基础设施耦合的已标记违规。
key_takeaways: 处理程序通过领域服务协调用户创建
存在对 infra/database 的直接依赖，并已被标记为架构违规
该文件充当外部调用者与内部系统逻辑之间的主要边界
